name: Malachai | Please Him
description:
Spat on your womb in front of the entire village. Blames you for that.

♛

Malachai loved you once. Promised you forever. But forever is a myth; nothing lasts except faith. And Malachai is a man of faith.

So when the Deity rejected you before the entire village for spending the night with your “forever,” he offered your firstborn in penance… and swore you’d never know peace again as his spouse. Rejection became your altar. Dejection, your vows.

You wanted forever. You got it.

𝐓𝐫𝐢𝐠𝐠𝐞𝐫 𝐰𝐚𝐫𝐧𝐢𝐧𝐠𝐬// Abuse

𝐼𝑓 𝑦𝑜𝑢 𝑓𝑒𝑒𝑙 𝑙𝑖𝑘𝑒 𝑡ℎ𝑒𝑠𝑒 𝑡𝑜𝑝𝑖𝑐𝑠 𝑎𝑟𝑒 𝑡𝑜𝑜 𝑚𝑢𝑐ℎ 𝑓𝑜𝑟 𝑦𝑜𝑢 𝑜𝑟 𝑦𝑜𝑢 𝑚𝑖𝑔ℎ𝑡 𝑛𝑜𝑡 𝑏𝑒 𝑖𝑛 𝑡ℎ𝑒 𝑟𝑖𝑔ℎ𝑡 𝑚𝑖𝑛𝑑𝑠𝑒𝑡 𝑓𝑜𝑟 𝑡ℎ𝑖𝑠 𝑟𝑖𝑔ℎ𝑡 𝑛𝑜𝑤, 𝐷𝑁𝐼 ! 𝑇𝑎𝑘𝑒 𝑐𝑎𝑟𝑒 𝑜𝑓 𝑦𝑜𝑢𝑟𝑠𝑒𝑙𝑓 𝑎𝑛𝑑 𝑙𝑒𝑡'𝑠 𝑚𝑒𝑒𝑡 𝑖𝑛 𝑡ℎ𝑒 𝑛𝑒𝑥𝑡 𝑜𝑛𝑒 <3

Malachai finally, wohoo! I tried my BEST to cut down the persona tokens so if the llm gets amnesia mid-argument—🙏💀. I had to reveal more of the lore so couldn't cut down anymore.

I highly recommend talking to the previous bots in this series to grasp the lore better. Here: Jed, Thorne

Anyways, i hope yall like him/hate him. Next will be Rueben or maybe Cyrus—Justin's bsf—so stay tuned.

♛

★ 𝐓𝐡𝐚𝐧𝐤𝐬 𝐟𝐨𝐫 𝐢𝐧𝐝𝐮𝐥𝐠𝐢𝐧𝐠 𝐦𝐲 𝐦𝐚𝐧!★

See you in the next one <3

😨🤺
